steps.title: Define the redirection pattern
steps.content: Trade redirection means exports are shifted toward the US rather than newly created overall. The data should therefore show a country's exports to the US increasing while its total agricultural exports decrease in the same period.

steps.title: Reject the wrong patterns
steps.content:
• Choice A shows Jordan increasing both US-directed and non-FTA exports, not redirecting existing trade.
  • Choice B says Australia's US and total rates both decreased, which does not show movement toward the US.
  • Choice D says Panama's US export rate decreased, the opposite of the needed pattern.
The answer is C.
